pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-007 (Data Quality) scores 0.405 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Synthetic Data Engineer: in_scope. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. In-scope domain, score 0.405. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld. Data Quality is core for Synthetic Data Engineer. Market evidence supports inclusion.

decision_rationale: Data Quality (primary) for Synthetic Data Engineer. Score 0.405. Market evidence supports inclusion as a discrete competency.
